Protect your RV from the elements

Your RV is more than just a vehicle — it’s your home on the road. Protect it from the elements and keep it looking new with our professional System X Ceramic Coating services. At Front Range Detail Studio, we specialize in high-quality ceramic coatings for all types of RVs and motorhomes, ensuring long-lasting protection against UV rays, oxidation, and the wear and tear of the open road.
Industry-leading ceramic technology

Your RV faces constant exposure to harsh environments — from the sun’s intense UV rays to road salt, dirt, and grime. System X Ceramic Coating creates a durable, hydrophobic barrier that protects your RV’s exterior and makes maintenance easier than ever.
Warranty Protection: All System X Ceramic Coatings come with a manufacturer-backed warranty for long-lasting peace of mind.
Prevents Oxidation & Fading: The ceramic coating shields your RV’s paint from UV damage, oxidation, and fading, keeping it looking vibrant for years.
Hydrophobic Properties: Water, dirt, and grime slide right off the surface, reducing buildup and making washing a breeze.
System X Ceramic Coating
Exterior Wash & Wax: Starting at $10/foot
Oxidation Removal & Paint Correction: $20–$35/foot
System X Ceramic Coating Application: Starting at $100/foot
Note: Prices may vary based on the size and condition of the RV.
Exterior, Windows, Wheels, Trim
Request a Quote
Protect Your RV with System X Ceramic CoatingKeep your RV looking like new while making cleaning and maintenance easier than ever — all backed by a warranty.
Exterior
Exterior and Windows
Hyper Gloss 9H Lifetime Coating

The Max G+™ package is our strongest and most durable protection package. Max G+™ features a stronger, tougher shell up to four times thicker, 2x stronger, and 2x more durable than previous System X coatings.
Ultimate Protection Max G+ Package
Yes, from Sprinter vans and pop-ups to large Class A diesel pushers — no rig is too big or too small!
Wax offers a few months of shine and protection. Our System X ceramic coating provides up to 3 years of real-world defense and makes cleaning much easier.
Absolutely — our multi-step correction process restores shine to even badly faded surfaces.
Most exterior packages take 1–3 days depending on the size and condition of your RV. We’ll provide a firm timeline with your quote.
For best results and warranty, we recommend our controlled shop environment. Mobile service may be available for select maintenance jobs — ask for details.

Same day service. Excellent and professional service. My RV is 7 years old and just completed a 1500 mile journey Covered in dust, dirt and bug covered windshield Sam cleaned everything and made it look brand new and shiny. I’m very happy with the results.
Geri P.

Brought 10 year old Navion motorhome to Sam for wash, polish and wax job. The quality of workmanship performed by Sam and crew was simply outstanding. We are more than pleased with the results. This is the best RV detailing service I’ve ever used…

We used Front Range Mobile Detailing to detail the exterior of our 20+ year old boat…it looks new. The service specifically was boat oxidation removal and buffing. Sam is very responsive and communicated through the whole process…
Cindy T.
Front range did an excellent job on our 5th wheel & F350! Sam was extremely knowledgeable and explained how he only uses top line products. His team brought the brand new shine back!
Alyson W.

I have nothing but good things to say about Front Range Detail Studio. Impeccable work, driven by attention to detail and obvious care for their customers. Experts at ceramic coating and maintenance. And we just added clear bra to the mix, and they did an excellent job with the applications. Very trusting of these guys with my CT5-V. Trust them as well, you won’t be disappointed.
Steve E.

On Point!!!Communication, Quality, Customer Service…All 5 star. I needed to get my truck ready to sell asap. I was wanting the full package, all the stuff. Dirty truck thats seen some miles and some roads. Honesty! They told me that I didn’t need all the extras and gave me a detailed explanation and a package that would suffice for a great price.

My experience started out looking for ceramic coating and thankfully Front Range Detail came up. It has the most 5 star reviews and I am another 5 star for them. The 1st thing that stood out to me was when we did the walk around my vehicle, they didn’t tet to up sell me, they actually told me what I wanted was going to take more long term, cost more, and become a maintenance issue.  My clear coat had scratches, swirls, bubbles, and many other blemishes.

We recently bought a new Jayco Class A Motorhome and wanted to ensure its bodywork stays in tip-top condition as long as possible. We engaged Sam and his team over 12 months ago to apply a ceramic coating and then regularly maintain and clean it since. They have done an amazing job and the unit still looks like it rolled off the assembly line yesterday despite Colorado weather and the miles.
Dean P.
Over 15 years experience in the automotive detailing industry. Car, Trucks, Semi Trucks, SUVs, RVs, Boats & Watercraft.

Our clients have one thing in common: they love their vehicle. From the Class A motorhome to the two-door convertible, our team of detail specialists are equipped and experienced to handle all detailing needs anywhere in Metro Denver.
12559 E Broncos Pkwy, Centennial, CO 80112

Comprehensive Inspection: We begin with a thorough assessment of your RV’s exterior to identify any areas needing special attention.
Surface Preparation: Our team performs a meticulous wash and decontamination process to remove all impurities.
Paint Correction: We address any imperfections, such as swirl marks or oxidation, to ensure a flawless surface.
Ceramic Coating Application: System X Ceramic Coating is carefully applied to all exterior surfaces, including paint, fiberglass, gel coat, windows, and wheels.
Curing: The coating is allowed to cure properly, forming a strong bond that offers long-lasting protection.
